sigWerErrors.reason: The insertion of '我' (I) at the beginning changes the subject and can confuse the meaning of the sentence, making it unclear who is being addressed.
'再' (again) and '在' (at/in) are different words with different meanings; this substitution changes the intended meaning of the phrase.
